docket_entries.description: STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM COMMISSIONER FILED BY AUTORETURN
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY AUTORETURN AS TO DEFENDANT MARTIN, JASON RAMONE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-28-2018 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ORDER RE: CONTINUED (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-17-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-17-2018 BY PRO TEM MICHAEL MAU. PLAINTIFF AUTORETURN IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY DAN SCANLAN, VP TOWING & QUALITY ASSURANCE. DEFENDANT IS NOT PRESENT.NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: MICHAEL MAU; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AUTORETURN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MARTIN, JASON RAMONE $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $260.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,760.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED FEB-17-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MARTIN, JASON RAMONE

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-28-2018 - CONTINUED ON COURT'S OWN MOTION TO APR-17-2018 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506 PLAINTIFF AUTORETURN IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY DAN SCANLAN, VP TOWING & QUALITY ASSURANCE. DEFENDANT IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT CALLED DEPT. 506 DURING THE PROCEEDING AND INDICATED HE THOUGHT THE HEARING WAS AT 850 BRYANT STREET. HONORABLE CECILIA P. CASTELLANOS GRANTED DEFENDANT A ONE TIME CONTINUANCE WITH NO OBJECTION BY PLAINTIFF ON OPEN RECORD. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CECILIA P. CASTELLANOS; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF AUTORETURN
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-17-2018 - JUDGMENT.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF AUTORETURN
